$comment: GENERATED by scripts/emit-keyset.mjs at build (tsup onSuccess) — do not edit by hand. Cross-language keyset for the Python Report-Engine consumer (Guard-Kit §7). Carries the full M7 vocabulary + context model so check_compliance can be re-implemented identically. Matching contract: word-stem/word forms match at word boundaries (case-sensitive for matchType 'word' = AI); phrase forms match the ordered word sequence with intervening non-word chars; a token is a violation unless an allowedContext fires (negation cue within `proximity` words before the match in the same clause — OR within `listNegationProximity` words when a comma/`or`/`nor` coordinator lies between the cue and the match, the negation scan stopping at a sentence terminator or a `clauseBreakers` word | match inside a compound `pattern` | match offset inside a caller-supplied disclaimer range).

allowedContexts.note: The named loan-program 'guarantee fee' (USDA upfront/annual guarantee fee, '0.35% annual guarantee fee') is a real fee term, not an advertising claim. Broadened from 'usda guarantee fee' to cover the abbreviated/annual label uses found in live Report-Engine template copy (m7-baseline DOMAIN_COMPOUND_SOT_GAP, pfp_prequal_summary:150).

The scenario-comparison column label 'MIP / Guarantee' (mortgage-insurance-premium vs. USDA guarantee-fee row). Live Report-Engine template label (m7-baseline DOMAIN_COMPOUND_SOT_GAP, pfp_scenario_comparison:187).
Named government program (e.g. VA/USDA loan guarantee program).
'not a guarantee of value' appraisal/disclosure phrasing.

allowedContexts.pattern: negation cue (not|never|no|isn't|won't…) within proximity words before the match, same sentence
allowedContexts.note: Affirmative-claim rule: the token is forbidden only as an affirmative claim. A negated/NOT-THAT use ('not a guarantee', 'this is not an approval') is compliant. Proven by the 7 live ACTIVE HecmContent rows (spec S3) whose forbidden tokens sit only inside NOT-THAT lines.

allowedContexts.pattern: match offset within a caller-supplied disclaimerRanges block
allowedContexts.note: Illustrative/disclaimer banners (Report-Engine ILLUSTRATIVE_BANNER 'Illustrative — not a loan offer, quote, or approval.'; Rello illustrative banners) legitimately name the forbidden tokens inside a clearly-marked disclaimer. The caller marks the range; fail-safe-strict if it does not (an unmarked banner HARD_BLOCKs).

Named federal designation: a 'HUD-approved counselor' / 'HUD-approved housing counselor' / 'HUD-approved condominium' / 'HUD-approved counseling' is a real HUD status, NOT an advertising approval claim. The mandatory HECM HUD-counseling line carries it on every compliant message (live Rello HecmContent comp-hud-counseling-mandatory, obj-reverse-scams, hecm-v1 property-type rows; Milo HUD-counseling line; RE pfp_hecm_scenario_comparison:92,417). Closes DISCOVERED-MILO-COMPLIANCE-WORDS-HUD-APPROVED-COMPOUND-MISSING-260531.
Named federal designation: 'FHA-approved' / 'FHA/HUD-approved' condo/lender status, not an advertising claim (live Rello hecm-v1-card-property-type-eligibility:402, hecm-v1-fcn-property-type:309).

Reference to HUD's published list of approved condominium projects — a domain artifact, not a borrower approval claim (live Rello hecm-v1-card-property-type-eligibility:523, hecm-v1-fcn-property-type:424).
FHA Single-Unit Approval (SUA) — a named condominium-eligibility process, not a borrower approval claim (live Rello hecm-v1-card-property-type-eligibility:561).
FHA/HUD condominium-project approval process (the 'condo-approval field'), a named eligibility step, not a borrower approval claim (live Rello hecm-v1-fcn-property-type:474).
